violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025

Raw animal foods (shell eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (donuts, deli meat) in the glass slide cold hold at service area. Raw animal foods must be separated (below) from raw ready-to-eat food during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025

Thermometers are lacking in a couple of refrigeration unit(s), including walk-in cooler. All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
A few of the refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair, splitting away from the doors/drawers. Gaskets are to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 - 25 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Dishwasher was primed and at proper concentration during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

Ambient temperature of the glass slide cold hold at the service area was observed held at 47 - 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Turkey observed with a temperature of 46 degrees F. Deli meats had been placed in this unit less than 2 hours prior to inspection and were moved to properly functioning units. The cold drawers of the grill observed with an ambient temperature of 46 - 47 degrees F. Cheese observed with a temperature of 44 degrees F. Foods were moved to properly functioning units. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. No TCS foods are to be stored in these units until they are serviced and maintaining a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

Thermometers are lacking in refrigeration units. All cold holding equipment (including walk-in cooler) used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

Individual cutting boards and the cutting boards of the front service area prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024
A few of the refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair, splitting away from the doors. Gaskets must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2025

Wood is used for the handle of the kitchen glass slide cold hold unit. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Handle must be replaced with a handle made of proper materials. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of black and pink residues. Ice machine is to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Proper air gap must be installed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2024

The cutting boards in the prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024

Wood is used in the construction of the handles on the 2 door slide unit. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Establishment must replace handles. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. Plate of the ice machine was cleaned at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Establishment is to install air gap. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine were observed with an accumulation of debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was emptied at the time of inspection. Ice machine is not to be used until it is cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024

2 door glass reach in was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Various foods were held at 50 degrees and above. All TCS foods were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. No TCS foods are to be stored in unit until unit is able to hold and ambient temperature of 41 DF or lower. Garlic n oil was observed on the counter at 75 DF. Garlic n oil was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024

Various foods packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Establishment is to properly label food packaged in establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2024
Knives were observed being stored in between prep unit. Knives were moved to 3-bay sink at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024

The cutting boards in the prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024

Wood is used in the construction of the handles on the 2 door slide unit. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Establishment must replace handles. Tape was observed on the deli slicer. Equipment must be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024
The prep sink was lacking an air gap. Establishment is to install air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2024
The smoothie freezer was observed with an accumulation of ice. Establishment is to run a defrost on unit. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2024
Hood system was observed with an accumulation of debris. Establishment is to clean hood system. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay and dish machine. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the kitchen and service area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2023

The condensate from the prep refrigeration unit is draining into a container in the basement. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023

The floor by the dish washer area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Through interview with PIC the floor is to be fixed mid July. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2023

Cheese and deli meat was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Items were being stored on ice, items are to be stored in prep unit. Items were voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2023

Pineapple in the smoothie freezer was observed in direct contact with ice build up from condensate. Pineapple was voluntarily disposed of. Establishment to defrost unit. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2023
Utensils were observed being stored between a table and a wall. Utensils must be stored on clean surfaces. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2023

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023
The handle on the bakery fridge was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the dishwasher and 3 bay. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the freezer and behind equipment in the kitchen have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023

The basement was observed with liquid leaking from the ceiling draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023
The floor in the dishwashing area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2023
The hood was observed with an accumulation of debris. Hood systems must be maintained as often as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023
